name: 中兴新云AI智报
description: AI reimbursement assistant for ZTE FSSC: reimburse, query invoices and expense bills via natural language.
description_zh: 财务云 AI 报销助手：用自然语言完成报销申请、发票查询识别、报销单查询与费用审批等操作。
description_en: ZTE FSSC AI reimbursement assistant: file reimbursements, recognize and query invoices, query expense bills and approve via natural language.
examples_zh: 帮我查询本月已提交的报销单
创建一张去北京出差的差旅报销单
我有一笔餐费要报销，帮我走流程
examples_en: Show my submitted reimbursement bills this month
Create a travel reimbursement for my Beijing business trip
I have a meal expense to reimburse, please start the process
